# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.  

## Issues addressed



## Checklist to run

- [ ] `devtools::document()` 
- [ ] `devtools::test()` 
- [ ] `devtools::check()`
- [ ] `styler::style_pkg()`
- [ ] Added necessary tests
- [ ] Updated the README / documentation if needed
